positive: A stylized, minimalist portrait of a forest creature, perhaps a fox or a deer, rendered with strong graphic lines and deep, saturated jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, deep amethyst). The creature should be depicted in a graceful, slightly stylized pose, emerging from swirling, stylized foliage and arcane geometric patterns. The composition must be perfectly centered, featuring crisp, clean silhouettes with high contrast against a slightly lighter, textured background. Emphasize linework and depth, suitable for an apparel graphic print. Highly detailed, vector art aesthetic, maximalist yet balanced composition, clean edges, volumetric light, printed on fabric texture.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, artifact, bad anatomy, low detail, noise, messy, messy background, extra limbs, signature, amateur drawing, jpeg artifacts, dirty
